name: Christmas Stories: Clara and the Guiding Star Collector's Edition
short_description: There’s life behind a toy’s eyes if you’re really looking.
detailed_description:
Big Fish Editor's Choice! This title was selected for its exceptional quality and overwhelmingly positive reviews from our Game Club beta testers.

Elephant Games the studio that entered the wonderous world of winter with Christmas Stories: Nutcracker invites you to once again explore the land of Christmas cheer with Christmas Stories: Clara and the Guiding Star!

The intrepid young Clara is a tinkerer at heart, but she has an undiscovered bravery in her soul that must show itself when a dark mystery unfolds before her. Clara’s father is attacked and turned into a lifeless toy by Mouserinks, an evil entity who rose from a dark dimension. Clara will soon discover that Mouserinks has victimized many others, and his reign of twisted terror may be far from over. But where exactly did Mouserinks come from, and why is he doing this? With the help of a friendly and driven nutcracker, Clara must uncover the past, present, and future of the monster, the family, and the meaning of Christmas to return peace to the season!

This is a special Collector's Edition release full of exclusive extras you won't find in the standard version. The Collector's Edition includes:

● Save Thomas Drosselmeyer and an entire town in the bonus chapter!

● Stay on track with the handy step-by-step strategy guide!

● Find dozens of additional hidden collectibles to unlock character bios and backstories!

● Check out a collection of downloadable wallpapers, a music player, concept art, and more!

This is a Hidden Object Puzzle Adventure game, meaning a specific genre of story-driven, point & click adventures. Throughout the game, players are tasked to find a list of objects hidden within a particular scene, and to occasionally complete various mini-games/puzzles.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German
*languages with full audio support
